wordplay_note: A sweet name for a bitter character
card_description: Wade Frazer (meaning "Frazer = strawberry / curly-haired") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *A Maze of Death*. Colonist who descends into paranoia and violence. Name note: A sweet name for a bitter character. Paranoia as rational response to an irrational environment. First appears in *A Maze of Death*.

reference.brief: Colonist who descends into paranoia and violence
reference.significance: Paranoia as rational response to an irrational environment
